title: orchis morio var. nicodemi
intro: Orchis morio var. nicodemi, also known as the green-winged orchid, is a variant of the Orchis morio species, a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The green-winged orchid is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and acting as an antiseptic. In herbal medicine, the plant's preparations are typically made by infusing the roots or flowers in water or using them in tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
